● Opus #3 independently reproduced it live — sampling the pane 3× and confirming
  the footer bar (with "esc to interrupt") persists even when the turn spinner
  is gone, plus a crucial detail: the current TUI's spinner parenthetical is (8m
  58s · ↓ 31.8k tokens) with no interrupt hint, so busy-detection must anchor
  on the duration/timer pattern, not any "esc" string. It also ruled out
  send_compact suppressors and scrollback staleness. While opus #2 (policy)
  finishes, I'm starting the corrected implementation — capturing real fixtures
  from the live pane first.

● Running 1 shell command…
  ⎿  $ export TMUX_TMPDIR=/run/user/1000/claude-tele; cd
     ~/projects/claude-watchdog && git checkout -q main && git pull -q && git
     checkout -q -b fix/pane-idle-footer-false-busy
     # capture the real CURRENT pane (streaming turn + background footer) as the
     busy fixture
     tmux -L default capture-pane -t telegr…
